body.title: management habits: bypass inference when habit matches
body.result: basal_ganglia.py: MANAGEMENT_PHRASES pre-check added. update swarm/cluster status → 0.97 direct dispatch. Import OK. Committed + pushed 11ccdd60.
body.description: Action habits marked bypass_inference=true skip LLM entirely when BG score >= threshold — call tool directly. Targets: PROC_SWARM_UPDATE, cluster_status, restart. Fixes: management commands going to cloud inference and getting conversational responses instead of tool execution.
